title: viola dravica
intro: Viola dravica, also known as the yellow gentian or Alpine yellow gentian, is a perennial plant species within the gentian family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, due to its bitter compounds such as gentiopicrin and gentianine. The health benefits of Viola dravica include relief from indigestion, nausea, and other gastrointestinal problems, as well as its potential role in regulating blood sugar levels. Herbal preparations of Viola dravica often include the plant's roots, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
